particle introducing direct and indirect questions; ا‎ ― أم‎ a - am in alternative questions; أم‎ - ا‎ سواء ‎― sawā’un a ― am no matter whether - or; و‎ أ‎ a-wa particle indicating or implying doubt: or? perhaps? ذلك‎ في‎ أوتشك‎ (tašukku) you wouldn't doubt it, would you? do you perhaps doubt it? or do you doubt it? أَلا‎ alā and أَما‎ a-mā intensifying interjections introducing sentences: verily, truly, indeed, oh yes, etc., فانظروا‎ أَلا‎ (fa-nẓurū) oh, do look! why, look! إنه‎ أَما‎ (innahū) why, he is ... !
translation.short: particle introducing direct and indirect questions
